ability.en: If more than 1 good player is executed, evil wins. All players know you are in play. After day 5, evil wins.
ability.es: Si más de 1 jugador bueno es ejecutado, los malvados ganan. Todos los jugadores saben que estás en juego. Luego del día 5, los malvados ganan.
ability.sv: Om mer än 1 god spelare avrättas vinner de onda. Alla vet att du är i spel. Efter dag 5 vinner de onda.
ability.zh: 如果多于一名善良玩家被处决，邪恶阵营获胜。所有玩家都知道利维坦在场。在第五个白天结束时，邪恶阵营获胜。
ability.cn:
如果多于一名善良玩家被处决，邪恶阵营获胜。
所有玩家都知道利维坦在场。
在第五个白天结束时，邪恶阵营获胜。

flavor.en: To the last, I grapple with thee. From Hell’s heart, I stab at thee. For hate’s sake, I spit my last breath at thee.
flavor.es: Hasta el final, lucho contigo. Desde el corazón del Infierno, te apuñalo. Por puro odio, te escupo mi último aliento.
flavor.sv: Till det sista kämpar jag mot dig. Från dödsrikets hjärta riktar jag mitt järn mot dig. Med mitt sista andetag slungar jag emot dig mitt utmanande hat.
flavor.zh: 末日将临，斗争永无止境。地狱之心，吾以利剑相迎。仇恨燃尽，然而愤懑难平。
flavor.cn:
末日将临，斗争永无止境。
地狱之心，吾以利剑相迎。
仇恨燃尽，然而愤懑难平。

first_night.en: Announce that the Leviathan is in play. :reminder:
first_night.es: Declara que "El Leviatán está en juego". Marca al Leviatán con la ficha de recordatorio de *DÍA 1*. :reminder:
first_night.sv: Meddela att Leviatan är i spel. :reminder:
first_night.zh: 宣布利维坦在场。将“第一天”提示标记放置在利维坦的角色标记旁。:reminder:

other_nights.en: Change the Leviathan reminder token to the relevant day. :reminder: You may announce that the Leviathan is in play.
other_nights.es: Opcionalmente, declara que "El Leviatán está en juego". Reemplaza la ficha de recordatorio. :reminder:
other_nights.sv: Ändra Leviatans påminnelse till rätt dag. :reminder: Du kan meddela att Leviatan är i spel.
other_nights.zh: 替换利维坦的提示标记 :reminder: 。你可以宣告“利维坦在场”。

how_to_run.cn:
在第一天黎明后，立即宣布利维坦在场。将“第一天”提示标记放置在利维坦的角色标记旁。在接下来的每一个白天开始时，将“第二天”、“第三天”、“第四天”、“第五天”提示标记依次替换放置在利维坦的角色标记旁。如果一个白天结束并且利维坦的角色标记旁有“第五天”提示标记，则宣布邪恶阵营获胜。
如果一名善良玩家被处决，将“善良被处决”提示标记放置在他的角色标记旁。
如果一名善良玩家被处决并且已经有一名玩家的角色标记旁放置了“善良被处决”提示标记，则宣布邪恶阵营获胜。
对于新手玩家，每天宣布利维坦在场，并说明今天是哪一天，这很有帮助的。在第一个白天，宣布“利维坦在场。这是第一天。” 在第二个白天，宣布“利维坦在场。现在是第二天。” 诸如此类。这可以帮助玩家们记住他们面对的是什么恶魔，并避免因忘记计算天数而意外落败。
how_to_run.en:
Immediately after dawn on the first day, declare that the Leviathan is in play. Mark the Leviathan with the DAY 1 reminder. At the beginning of each following day, mark the Leviathan with DAY 2, then DAY 3, then DAY 4, then DAY 5 reminders. If a day ends and the Leviathan is marked with the DAY 5 reminder, declare that evil wins.
If a good player is executed, mark them with the GOOD PLAYER EXECUTED reminder.
If a good player is executed and a player is already marked with the GOOD PLAYER EXECUTED reminder, declare that evil wins.
For new players, it is helpful to declare that the Leviathan is in play each day, and to say what day it is. On the first day, say “The Leviathan is in play. It is day one.” On the second day, say “The Leviathan is in play. It is day two.” etc. This helps your players remember what Demon they are facing and avoid accidentally losing by forgetting to count the days.

cn: 利维坦在场。在第一个白天，僧侣提名了贞洁者，僧侣被处决。在第二个白天，侍臣被处决。邪恶阵营获胜。
利维坦在场。在第二个白天，红唇女郎被处决。在第三个白天，投毒者被处决。在第五个白天，士兵被处决。邪恶阵营获胜。
en: For new players, it is helpful to declare that the Leviathan is in play each day, and to say what day it is. On the first day, say “The Leviathan is in play. It is day one.” On the second day, say “The Leviathan is in play. It is day two.” etc. This helps your players remember what Demon they are facing and avoid accidentally losing by forgetting to count the days.
On the first day, the Monk nominates the Virgin, and is executed. On the second day, the Courtier is executed. Evil wins.
On the second day, the Scarlet Woman is executed. On the third day, the Poisoner is executed. On the fifth day, the Soldier is executed. Evil wins.

cn: 鼓励善良阵营早早开始处决。由于您无法在晚上杀死玩家，因此能够干掉非常强大的角色，例如占卜师或卖花女孩，会非常有帮助。专注于干掉每晚行动或每局游戏只行动一次的角色。干掉一个只在首夜获得信息的角色，或者每场游戏使用一次的能力且已经使用过的角色几乎没有什么好处。
注意大家想要处决的角色类型。如果大家想要处决只有一次性能力的角色，因为他们认为这样做更安全，那么不要伪装成只有一次性能力的角色。如果团队想要处决每晚行动的角色，因为那是恶魔应该在利维坦局中常常伪装的角色，那你就伪装成已经行动的角色，或外来者。这将帮助您避免第一次就被处决。
如果您不知道如何伪装角色，请默认伪装成想要隐藏自己角色的强大角色。由于大多数玩家在最后一天仍然活着，因此猎手，侍女，博学者或艺术家等强大的善良角色不需要为了躲刀而隐藏自己的角色。 “你不是你所说的那个角色，因为恶魔会在最后一天之前杀死那个角色”的论点毫无意义。
早点伪装成其他角色。由于玩家只能被处决，所以大部分善良玩家都不会遮遮掩掩。保持沉默的玩家更有可能被视为邪恶玩家，而不是隐藏某些东西的善良玩家。
尽可能多地怀疑具有检测恶魔能力的玩家。如果善良玩家能确认善良玩家，那是无益的，但不是世界末日。如果善良玩家可以确认爪牙，那还过得去，因为被处决的是爪牙而不是恶魔。但是能够确认恶魔的玩家是毁灭性的。他们需要被抹杀。
如果你是恶魔，选择不可证伪的伪装角色。在正常的游戏中，能够回过头来说你的信息是错误的：“因为你可能喝醉或中毒”可能会起作用，因为善良阵营有很多处决来弄清楚哪些信息是真的，哪些不是。当利维坦在场时，并且在最后一天还有很多玩家还活着时，善良阵营通常会回到最简单的解释，而不是弄清楚大局——通过处决信息似乎有误的一名玩家。
如果你是一个爪牙，而还没有玩家被处决，尽你所能让自己看起来像一个善良玩家。这使您可以尽可能长时间地生存并传播错误信息。被怀疑作恶被处决是可以的。但是，你被处决后所有人都确认你是邪恶的，在最后一天之前再次处决，大家确认至少有一名死去的玩家是邪恶的时，这根本没有帮助。
如果你是一个爪牙，并且已经有一位玩家被处决，尽你所能看起来像一个恶魔。由于只剩下一次处决，被善良阵营认为可能是恶魔的每个玩家都可能在第五天被处决，避免恶魔被处决，从而使邪恶获胜。
关注已经过去了多少天。如果你知道还剩多少时间，可以相应地计划你的策略，并且你不会对游戏的意外结束感到惊讶。
计划在整个游戏中总共只执行两名玩家。如果你假定第一个被处决的玩家是善良的，你不会因为意外处决第二个善良玩家而输掉游戏。如果你假定第一个被处决的玩家是邪恶的，然后再次处决，那么你可能错了并且意外处决了两个善良玩家。每天处决玩家并假定他们是邪恶的，这是非常冒险的，可能会给邪恶带来胜利。
等到第三或第四天再处决第一个玩家。不用着急。你可以利用这段时间收集尽可能多的信息，并在以后明智地执行处决。
等到第五天执行第二个玩家。这保证了善良阵营不会因为处决两名善良玩家而输掉比赛，因为无论被处决的玩家的阵营如何，比赛都会在第五天结束时结束。等到第五天给善良阵营最大的时间来收集信息和讨论谁是谁的各种可能性。
如果你相当确定谁是爪牙，并且他们是会造成麻烦的爪牙类型，则在游戏早期处决他们。忽略可能是也可能不是爪牙的玩家，忽略可能是爪牙但不会过多影响好团队信息的玩家。例如，在游戏初期杀死投毒者或红唇女郎是绝对有益的，但杀死男爵或间谍并没有太大好处。当然，你剥夺了这些玩家的投票权，但由于可能只有两次处决恶魔的机会，因此善良阵营通过尝试在两次处决中处决恶魔来获得最大的获胜机会。
如果你几乎可以确定某个玩家是爪牙，请在游戏早期处决他们。这将有机会在比赛过程中处决三名玩家。
一些角色从处决玩家中受益，例如送葬者或食人族。如果这些角色在发挥作用，那么尽早处决可能会有所帮助。此外，由于利维坦不会在晚上行动，许多角色都被它所困扰，并以奇怪而有益的方式运作。与你的说书人核实这些角色的相克特殊规则。
找出哪些玩家是善良的。即使你可以建立一个90%确认为善良玩家的列表，这也会缩小恶魔的可能性范围。如果你能找出两三个善良玩家，那么在处决恶魔的时候，能够在五个玩家而不是八个玩家之间进行选择，更有可能获得胜利。
尽早在第一天分享你的信息。鼓励其他人也这样做。由于玩家不会在晚上死去，因此你可以相当肯定大多数（如果不是全部）信息角色将存活到最后一天。如果善良玩家在游戏中尽早分享他们的信息，他们会给自己尽可能多的时间来讨论可能性。
尽可能将你的信息分享给整个团队。利维坦局几乎不需要保密，每个人拥有的信息越多越好。
如果不止一名玩家声称与另一名玩家是同一个角色，则需要分析正反两种逻辑，并探索两者。通常，当两个玩家都声称是同一个角色时，其中一个是爪牙，最好同时处决他们。然而，由于可用的处决有限，通常最好将两个玩家都视为可能有有用的信息，并探索两者。其中一名玩家可能是爪牙，因此不需要处决。关键是要找到恶魔，而不仅仅是邪恶的玩家。
如果你想冒险，在最后一天之前处决两名玩家可以提供很棒的信息。如果两名玩家被处决并且游戏继续进行，那么你就知道其中至少有一个是爪牙。了解事实往往会滚雪球，并提供其他有用的信息，甚至100%确认或否认玩家的角色。但要注意……这个策略可能会在这个过程中输掉游戏。
中毒是邪恶角色能力的结果。知道哪个恶魔在场意味着你知道哪些恶魔不在场。查看剧本中可能在场的爪牙，这将告诉你哪些角色（如果有）正在毒害玩家。这可能是至关重要的信息。关注哪些爪牙可能在游戏中，并从这一点开始分析。
en: Encourage the good team to execute early in the game. Since you are not able to kill players at night, being able to neutralise a very powerful character, such as the Fortune Teller or the Flowergirl, can be very helpful. Focus on removing characters that act every night, or only act once per game. There is little benefit to removing a character that only gets information on night one, or that has a once-per-game ability that has already been used.

Pay attention to which types of characters the group wants to execute. If the group wants to execute characters that act only once, because they consider that a safer execution, then don't bluff as a character that acts only once. If the group wants to execute characters that act each night, because that is what the Demon should be bluffing as in a Leviathan game, then bluff as a character that has already acted, or an Outsider. This will help you avoid the first execution.

If you don't know which character to bluff as, default to bluffing as a powerful character that would normally want to hide their identity. Since most players will still be alive on the final day, powerful good characters such as the Slayer, Chambermaid, Savant or Artist don't need to hide their identity for fear of the Demon killing them. The argument that "You aren't the character you say you are, because the Demon would have killed that character before the final day" makes no sense.

Bluff early. Since players can only die by execution, most of the good players will not be secretive. Players who remain silent are much more likely to be seen as evil, and not as good players who are hiding something.

Cast as much suspicion as possible on players that have abilities that detect the Demon. If good players can confirm good players, that is unhelpful, but not the end of the world. If good players can confirm Minions as Minions, that's not too bad, since an executed Minion isn't an executed Demon. But players that can confirm Demons are devastating. They need to be discredited.

If you are the Demon, choose bluffs that are unfalsifiable. In a normal game, being able to fall back to saying that your information is wrong "because you might be drunk or poisoned" might work, since the good team has many executions to figure out what is true and what isn't. When Leviathan is in play, and there are lots of players alive on the final day, the good team will often revert to the simplest explanation instead of figuring out the big picture - by executing the one player whose information seems to be wrong.

If you are a Minion, and a player has not been executed yet, do what you can to look like a good player. This allows you to survive as long as possible and spread misinformation. Being suspected of being evil and being executed is OK. But it is not helpful at all to be so suspected of being evil that after being executed, the good team executes again before the final day, confirming that at least one dead player is evil.

If you are a Minion, and a player has already been executed, do everything you can to look like a Demon. With only one execution remaining, every player that the good team thinks could possibly be the Demon is a player that might get executed on day five instead of the Demon, granting evil the win.

jinxes.reason: Each night*, the Leviathan chooses an alive good player (different to previous nights): a chosen Banshee dies & gains their ability.
If the Leviathan nominates and executes the Exorcist-chosen player, good wins.
Each night*, the Leviathan chooses an alive good player (different to previous nights): a chosen Farmer uses their ability but does not die.
If the Leviathan is in play and the Grandchild dies by execution, evil wins.
The Leviathan cannot enter play after day 5.
If the Leviathan nominates and executes an Innkeeper-protected player, good wins.
If the Leviathan is in play, and at least 1 player is dead, the King learns an alive character each night.
If the Leviathan and the Mayor are alive on day 5 & no execution occurs, good wins.
If the Leviathan nominates and executes the Monk-protected player, good wins.
The Leviathan cannot enter play after day 5.
Each night*, the Leviathan chooses an alive player (different to previous nights): a chosen Ravenkeeper uses their ability but does not die.
Each night*, the Leviathan chooses an alive good player (different to previous nights): a chosen Sage uses their ability but does not die.
If the Leviathan nominates and executes the Soldier, good wins.
